quotes.line: Every expert was once a beginner who refused to quit.
quotes.author: On growth

quotes.line: Small actions, practiced daily, compound into mastery.
quotes.author: On consistency

quotes.line: The mind that opens to a new idea never returns to its original size.
quotes.author: On curiosity

quotes.line: Knowledge is the only asset that grows when you give it away.
quotes.author: On sharing

quotes.line: Progress, not perfection, is the only benchmark that matters.
quotes.author: On progress

quotes.line: The gap between who you are and who you want to be is called learning.
quotes.author: On ambition

quotes.line: Invest in your mind. Every other investment depends on it.
quotes.author: On priorities

quotes.line: You don't rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your habits.
quotes.author: On discipline

quotes.line: The beautiful thing about learning is that no one can take it away from you.
quotes.author: On ownership

quotes.line: An investment in knowledge always pays the best interest.
quotes.author: On wisdom

quotes.line: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
quotes.author: On urgency

quotes.line: The more that you read, the more things you will know.
quotes.author: On reading
